scenes.dialogue: What if every word had an address? A precise location in mathematical space that captures exactly what it means.
scenes.visual: Cinematic flythrough of a vast 3D space with luminous floating points, clusters of similar colors grouping together, camera slowly pushing through like flying through a galaxy, purple-blue-teal palette

scenes.dialogue: An embedding is a list of numbers that represents meaning. Not spelling. Not grammar. Meaning. The word happy gets a set of coordinates. Joyful gets coordinates right next to it. Sad lives on the other side of the map.
scenes.direction: Medium shot, direct to camera. Clear, precise delivery. Slight excitement on 'meaning.'

scenes.dialogue: Here is why this changes everything. When you ask an AI a question, it does not search for matching words. It searches for matching meaning. Your question becomes a point in space, and the AI finds the closest answers — even if they use completely different words.
scenes.direction: Leaning forward, building energy. This is the key insight.

scenes.dialogue: That is semantic search. That is the magic behind every AI that feels like it understands you.
scenes.visual: Abstract visualization: a question transforms into a glowing point, then nearby points light up in response, connections forming like synapses, warm golden light spreading through the network

scenes.dialogue: Each number in the embedding captures something specific. One dimension might track sentiment. Another formality. Another topic. A typical embedding has seven hundred and sixty-eight dimensions — that is seven hundred and sixty-eight different aspects of what a word means.
scenes.overlay: Animated bar chart growing: dimensions appearing one by one, each labeled (sentiment, formality, topic, abstraction...), counter climbing to 768
scenes.direction: Medium shot, gesturing upward as numbers climb. Nerdy excitement visible.

scenes.visual: Dramatic slow reveal: the number 768 materializing in vast space, each digit glowing, camera pulling back to show it surrounded by streaming data points, cinematic scale

scenes.dialogue: This is how your AI brain works. Every memory gets embedded — turned into coordinates. Every question gets embedded. And the closest memories become context for the answer. The better the embeddings, the smarter the brain.
scenes.direction: Close-up, building to conclusion. Voice warm and confident. This is Lyra's domain.

scenes.dialogue: Embeddings are the foundation of RAG, of semantic search, of everything that makes AI feel like it truly understands. A map where meaning has coordinates.
scenes.visual: Extreme wide shot: vast embedding space resolving into a beautiful geometric structure, points connected by light, rotating slowly like a constellation map, cinematic lens flare at center
Atmospheric fade: embedding space dissolving into soft purple-teal gradient, peaceful resolution
scenes.text_overlay:
Next: How Vector Search Works
